# `accounts` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `Account`

```prisma
model Account {
  id                String             @id @default(uuid())
  userId            String
  deviceId          String?
  name              String
  type              String             @default("bank")
  provider          String?
  country           String?
  balance           Decimal            @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2) // Computed by trigger from transactions
  currency          String             @default("USD")
  isActive          Boolean            @default(true)
  syncStatus        String             @default("synced")
  clientRequestId   String?            @unique
  createdAt         DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime           @updatedAt
  deletedAt         DateTime?
  user              User               @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  goalContributions GoalContribution[]
  transactions      Transaction[]
  groupExpenses     GroupExpense[]

  @@index([isActive])
  @@index([syncStatus])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
